name: Beef Bourguignon Stir Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Beef flank or round steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread almonds in a single layer in a shallow pan.
2. Place in a cold oven; toast at 350 degrees for 9 to 11 minutes, stirring occasionally, until lightly toasted; cool.
3. Cut steak across the grain into thin slices (1/4 inch thick).
4. Heat oil in a large pan or wok; brown steak in 2 batches and remove.
5. Add mushrooms, onions, and garlic to the pan; stir fry for 1 minute.
6. Add 1 cup broth and wine. Cook over high heat until the liquid is reduced by half, about 10 minutes.
7. Dissolve cornstarch in the remaining 1/4 cup beef broth; stir into the pan.
8. Cook until the mixture thickens and boils.
9. Stir in beef, carrots, celery, almonds, vinegar, and herbs.
10. Bring to a simmer to just heat through.
11. Serve immediately with steamed potatoes.
